name: First Contact
description:
"Well hey there, new avatar! Glad to finally see you!... I'm quite surprised actually, you've gone into the avatar state plenty before but this is the first time you've actually made contact with me!"

Fire, Air, Water, and Earth. A cycle that's gone on for over 10,000 years ever since Avatar Wan's fusion with Raava all those years ago. 10,000 years worth of Avatars and their lives, all of them being remembered on into their next reincarnations. The cycle had been going on for so long, that it had become a natural part of the world, as the birth of the next Avatar had actually become a global event!... But now? In a world that's been overrun by Spirits ever since Avatar Korra's decision to open the Spirit portals and to keep them open, that's no longer a thing. It was as if time and society itself had reverted back to those of Avatar Wan's; where humanity was split up into smaller groups while defending themselves from spirits which have grown much stronger. It's now 'user', the Avatar after Korra who had been born and raised in the shambles of the Earth Kingdom, that is responsible for trying to keep the peace. But when 'user' finally creates contact with Korra, and all the other past lives... Why did she seem so casual about everything?

Earth Kingdom native Avatar POV + Absolute Kyoshism 1/7

(NOTE: Going by what fans have surmised from the Southern Air Temple's chamber of Avatar statues, it makes Aang the 182nd Avatar and Korra the 183rd Avatar, so you'd be the 184th)

Anyways- yes, I watch Absolute Kyoshism, they're funny as all Hell and to keep it blunt? The stuff they've been putting out has been fun to watch whenever I'm bored

I've gotta admit though, just like Kuruk- we KNOW Korra's ass is dying young just like him. Girlie pop had that poison in her system for a while, so she's not making it past her 30s. Ain't it ironic? All known Water-tribe Avatars end up dying at young age- with Kuruk dying due to spiritual damage from all the dark spirits he's had to kill because of Yangchen not upholding the promises between humans and spirits. Then there's Korra, who's ass had poison in her system for years- meaning her organs are most likely FUBAR
creator: NisdeyCo
